recommendation: Rest and stay hydrated. Take paracetamol for fever if prescribed.
medical_attention: Monitor temperature. See a doctor if fever lasts over 3 days.

recommendation: Drink warm fluids and use a humidifier.
medical_attention: Consult a doctor if you experience wheezing or shortness of breath.

recommendation: Rest in a dark quiet room. Stay hydrated.
medical_attention: Seek attention if accompanied by vision changes or numbness.

recommendation: Ensure a balanced diet rich in iron and get adequate sleep.
medical_attention: Schedule a routine blood test with a physician.

recommendation: Follow a bland diet (BRAT) and sip electrolytes.
medical_attention: Seek immediate help if signs of severe dehydration appear.

recommendation: Gargle with warm salt water and rest your voice.
medical_attention: Get a throat swab if swallowing becomes highly painful.

recommendation: Stop all physical activity immediately and sit down.
medical_attention: EMERGENCY: Call an ambulance or go to the nearest ER immediately.

recommendation: Use your rescue inhaler if diagnosed. Remain calm.
medical_attention: EMERGENCY: Seek immediate emergency medical care if breathing fails to improve.
